meaning: n.强烈的邪欲(尤指:色欲,淫欲)
examples: Not in the lust of concupiscence, even as the Gentiles which know not God
But sin, taking occasion by the commandment, wrought in me all manner of concupiscence. For without the law sin was dead.
But sin, taking occasion by the commandment, wrought in me all manner of concupiscence. For without the law sin [was] dead.
James Atlas salutes Saul Bellow's talent, but he has some doubts about the relentless mixture of concupiscence and creativity.
